'''Goblin Pack''' is a other item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Goblin Pack}}

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Goblin Pack}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
This foul smelling container is made from animal hide and filled with whatever trinkets its owner collected. Occasionally a goblin will keep a pet beetle, worm or spider in these, so be careful when opening.
}}
